steps.title: Use the availability contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts how the underground protest game was originally distributed with how it is now readily available online. Under an authoritarian regime, the original distribution would have been secret or hidden.

steps.title: Reject manner mismatches
steps.content: Choice B means insincerely. Choice C means briefly. Choice D means without emotion. None of those describes covert distribution. The word meaning secretly or stealthily fits the political-protest context and the contrast with open online access. The answer is A.
